name: Wanyamon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: The user smiles cutely, then surprises the foe by biting suddenly.

description: A Digimon fused from the data of small, pet animals like dogs and cats. Because its unexpected movements are also quick, caution is necessary so that it doesn't get away, but it becomes very emotionally attached if shown affection like a pet. Its Special Move is suddenly biting, after appearing amply charming ( Smile Fang ).
